blocks.content: They stopped at the end of her front walk. The porch light was on even though it was still afternoon.
She had her hand on her bike and was looking at him directly.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You can like who you like, Kit. That's not — that's not the thing.
She paused. The porch light buzzed. Somewhere inside the house the TV was on.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Don't stop coming to find me.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: That's all. Just don't do that.
She held his gaze for one second. Then she took her bike up the walk and went inside.
